parameters.jsCode:
console.log('Queue is empty — no pending rows in reels-queue.xlsx');
return [{ json: { status: 'no_pending', message: 'Queue is empty.' } }];

const captionData = $('Generate Caption & Hashtags (AI)').first().json;
const ytMeta = $input.first().json;
const reelData = $('Generate Reel (FFmpeg)').first().json;
const pickData = $('Pick Best Media Items').first().json;
const musicData = $('Fetch Music Track (Jamendo)').first().json;

return [{ json: {
  destination: pickData.destination,
  video_url: reelData.video_url || '',
  title: captionData.title || '',
  caption: captionData.caption || '',
  hashtags: captionData.hashtags || [],
  hashtag_block: captionData.hashtag_block || '',
  keywords: captionData.keywords || '',
  formatted_post: captionData.formatted_post || '',
  char_count: captionData.char_count || 0,
  within_limit: captionData.within_limit !== false,
  reel_duration_secs: pickData.estimated_duration_secs || 0,
  row_index: pickData.row_index,
  groq_model: captionData.groq_model || '',
  place_names: pickData.place_names || [],
  music_source: musicData.source || 'none',
  music_title: musicData.title || '',
  music_artist: musicData.artist || '',
  youtube_title: ytMeta.youtube_title || '',
  youtube_description: ytMeta.youtube_description || '',
  youtube_tags: ytMeta.youtube_tags || [],
  youtube_pinned_comment: ytMeta.youtube_pinned_comment || '',
  youtube_title_variations: ytMeta.youtube_title_variations || [],
}}];
